affirmative_question_headers.header: Which do you prefer the most?
Which would you choose?
Which appeals to you the most?
Which do you find most desirable?
What would you work the hardest to achieve?
Which would motivate you the most?
Which would you put the most effort into achieving?
What is most valuable to you?
What matters the most to you?
What would you prioritize above the others?
What would make you the happiest?
You would be the most grateful for which outcome?
If you could only have one of these events be realized, which would it be?
You will be most excited about which outcome?
What would bring you the most joy?
What would improve your wellbeing the most?
What would bring you the most bliss?
You would choose to live in a world with which of the following features?
Let's discuss on ways to achieve the following outcomes. Which discussion would you most want to participate in?
What would motivate you the most?
You've received news of the following events. Which one would totally make your day?
You have $100 to make one of the following happen. Which one would you spend on?
You have $1 billion to make one of the following happen. Which one would you spend on?
You have an hour a day to make one of the following come true. Which one would you spend on?
You have 12 hours a day to make one of the following come true. Which one would you spend on?
What would change your life for the better?
In your opinion, which is the most perfect world?
What would give you the most positive experience?
What would give you the most satisfying experience?
What would make life easier for you?
What would make life more enjoyable for you?
What would make unpleasant experiences more enjoyable for you?
When things are not going well, what would you want to happen?
You would celebrate which outcome?
Which world sounds most appealing to you?
Given these alternatives, which do you like most?
From the following list, which is a necessity for you?
What do you dream of achieving?
Which future world do you prefer?
What would be most beneficial for you?
What would you most like to see in your lifetime?
What would you most welcome?
What do you love the most?

aversive_question_headers.header: Which do you prefer less?
Which do you dislike more?
Which would you have less tendency to choose?
Which would you have more tendency to avoid?
Which appeals to you less?
Which is less unpleasant to you?
Which do you find less desirable?
Which do you find more undesirable?
Which do you prioritize less to achieve?
Which do you try to avoid more?
Which would motivate you less?
Which would make you more unmotivated?
Which would you put less effort into achieving?
Which would you put more effort into avoiding?
What is not as valuable to you?
What is more worthless to you?
What matters less to you?
Which gives you less happiness?
Which gives you more dissatisfaction?
You will be not as excited about which outcome?
You will be more disappointed by which outcome?
What would bring you less joy?
What would bring you more pain?
Which would not improve your wellbeing as much as the others?
Which would worsen your wellbeing more?
Which would bring you less bliss than the others?
Which would cause your more discomfort than the others?
Let's discuss on ways to achieve the following outcomes. Which discussion would you deprioritize?
Let's discuss on ways to avoid the following outcomes. Which discussion would you prioritize?
What would motivate you less?
What do you prefer less?
You have $100 to make the following events happen. Which one would you spend the least on?
You have $100 to block the following events from happening. Which one would you spend more on?
You have $1 billion to make the following events happen. Which one would you spend the least on?
You have $1 billion to block the following events from happening. Which one would you spend more on?
You have an hour a day to make the following events come true. Which one would you spend the least on?
You have an hour a day to block the following events from happening. Which one would you spend more on?
You have 12 hours a day to make the following events come true. Which one would you spend the least on?
You have 12 hours a day to block the following events from happening. Which one would you spend more on?
In your opinion, which is not as good as the others?
In your opinion, which is worse?
What would give you less positive experience?
What would give you more negative experience?
What would give you less satisfying experience?
What would give you more stressful experience?
What gives you less pleasure than the others?
What gives you more displeasure than the others?
You would celebrate which outcome less?
Which world sounds less appealing to you?
Which world sounds more unpleasant to you?
Given these alternatives, which do you like less?
Given these alternatives, which do you hate more?
From the following list, which is not as necessary for you?
What would be not as beneficial for you?
What would be more detrimental for you?
